selectedTaskBefore.title: Detect nested project roots so Ralph can inspect the starter extension from the repo root
selectedTaskBefore.notes: The current root-level workspace summary misses `ralph-codex-vscode-starter/package.json`, `src/`, and the extension validation scripts.

selectedTaskAfter.title: Detect nested project roots so Ralph can inspect the starter extension from the repo root
selectedTaskAfter.notes: Workspace scanning now selects the nested `ralph-codex-vscode-starter` project root when the repo root has no shallow markers, and the runtime build was refreshed so the extension uses the updated scan path.
